info.title: fsdocs
info.description: The 'dotnet fsdocs' documentation generation tool for F# projects. Install use 'dotnet tool add fsdocs-tool'. See the project site for documentation.

commands.name: convert
commands.description: convert a single document (.md, .fsx, .ipynb) to HTML or another output format without building a full documentation site

options.name: --output
options.description: Output file path. Defaults to the input filename with the output format extension in the current directory.

options.name: --template
options.description: Path to an HTML template file, or 'fsdocs' to use the built-in default template. When omitted, raw content is written.

options.name: --outputformat
options.description: Output format: html (default), ipynb, latex, fsx, markdown. When not specified, inferred from the output file extension.

options.name: --eval
options.description: Evaluate F# fragments in scripts. [default: False]

options.name: --linenumbers
options.description: Add line numbers. [default: False]

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Additional substitution parameters, e.g. --parameters key1 value1 key2 value2

options.name: --no-embed-resources
options.description: Disable automatic inlining of local CSS, JS, and images into the output HTML. By default, when a template is used for HTML output, all locally-referenced assets are embedded so the output is a self-contained single file. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: build
commands.description: build the documentation for a solution based on content and defaults

options.name: --input
options.description: Input directory of documentation content. [default: docs]

options.name: --projects
options.description: Project files to build API docs for outputs, defaults to all packable projects.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output Folder (default 'output' for 'build' and 'tmp/watch' for 'watch'.

options.name: --noapidocs
options.description: Disable generation of API docs. [default: False]

options.name: --ignoreuncategorized
options.description: Disable generation of 'Other' category for uncategorized docs. [default: False]

options.name: --ignoreprojects
options.description: Disable project cracking. [default: False]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Fail if there is a problem generating docs. [default: False]

options.name: --eval
options.description: Evaluate F# fragments in scripts. [default: False]

options.name: --qualify
options.description: In API doc generation qualify the output by the collection name, e.g. 'reference/FSharp.Core/...' instead of 'reference/...' . [default: False]

options.name: --saveimages
options.description: Save images referenced in docs (some|none|all). If 'some' then image links in formatted results are saved for latex and ipynb output docs. [default: none]

options.name: --sourcefolder
options.description: Source folder at time of component build (defaults to value of `<FsDocsSourceFolder>` from project file, else current directory)

options.name: --sourcerepo
options.description: Source repository for github links (defaults to value of `<FsDocsSourceRepository>` from project file, else `<RepositoryUrl>/tree/<RepositoryBranch>` for Git repositories)

options.name: --linenumbers
options.description: Add line numbers. [default: False]

options.name: --nonpublic
options.description: The tool will also generate documentation for non-public members [default: False]

options.name: --mdcomments
options.description: Assume /// comments in F# code are markdown style (defaults to value of `<UsesMarkdownComments>` from project file) [default: False]

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Additional substitution substitutions for templates, e.g. --parameters key1 value1 key2 value2

options.name: --nodefaultcontent
options.description: Do not copy default content styles, javascript or use default templates.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Provide properties to dotnet msbuild, e.g. --properties Configuration=Release Version=3.4

options.name: --fscoptions
options.description: Extra flags for F# compiler analysis, e.g. dependency resolution.

options.name: --clean
options.description: Clean the output directory. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: watch
commands.description: build the documentation for a solution based on content and defaults, watch it and serve it

options.name: --input
options.description: Input directory of documentation content. [default: docs]

options.name: --projects
options.description: Project files to build API docs for outputs, defaults to all packable projects.

options.name: --output
options.description: Output Folder (default 'output' for 'build' and 'tmp/watch' for 'watch'.

options.name: --noapidocs
options.description: Disable generation of API docs. [default: False]

options.name: --ignoreuncategorized
options.description: Disable generation of 'Other' category for uncategorized docs. [default: False]

options.name: --ignoreprojects
options.description: Disable project cracking. [default: False]

options.name: --strict
options.description: Fail if there is a problem generating docs. [default: False]

options.name: --eval
options.description: Evaluate F# fragments in scripts. [default: False]

options.name: --qualify
options.description: In API doc generation qualify the output by the collection name, e.g. 'reference/FSharp.Core/...' instead of 'reference/...' . [default: False]

options.name: --saveimages
options.description: Save images referenced in docs (some|none|all). If 'some' then image links in formatted results are saved for latex and ipynb output docs. [default: none]

options.name: --sourcefolder
options.description: Source folder at time of component build (defaults to value of `<FsDocsSourceFolder>` from project file, else current directory)

options.name: --sourcerepo
options.description: Source repository for github links (defaults to value of `<FsDocsSourceRepository>` from project file, else `<RepositoryUrl>/tree/<RepositoryBranch>` for Git repositories)

options.name: --linenumbers
options.description: Add line numbers. [default: False]

options.name: --nonpublic
options.description: The tool will also generate documentation for non-public members [default: False]

options.name: --mdcomments
options.description: Assume /// comments in F# code are markdown style (defaults to value of `<UsesMarkdownComments>` from project file) [default: False]

options.name: --parameters
options.description: Additional substitution substitutions for templates, e.g. --parameters key1 value1 key2 value2

options.name: --nodefaultcontent
options.description: Do not copy default content styles, javascript or use default templates.

options.name: --properties
options.description: Provide properties to dotnet msbuild, e.g. --properties Configuration=Release Version=3.4

options.name: --fscoptions
options.description: Extra flags for F# compiler analysis, e.g. dependency resolution.

options.name: --clean
options.description: Clean the output directory. [default: False]

options.name: --noserver
options.description: Do not serve content when watching. [default: False]

options.name: --nolaunch
options.description: Do not launch a browser window. [default: False]

options.name: --open
options.description: URL extension to launch http://localhost:<port>/%s.

options.name: --port
options.description: Port to serve content for http://localhost serving. [default: 8901]

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

commands.name: init
commands.description: initialize a docs folder with a default index.md and optionally a _template.html

options.name: --input
options.description: The directory to initialize (default: docs). [default: docs]

options.name: --force
options.description: Overwrite existing files (default: false). [default: False]

options.name: --with-template
options.description: Also scaffold a _template.html file in the docs directory. [default: False]

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.
